creator: andrew@ugh.net.au
text:
When I try and run PPP (ijppp) I get the standard cant find library message
about libdes.3.0.so. I didnt ask for DES but apparently ppp was compiled so.

Ive been meaning to report this a while soits probably already fixed.

Fix: 

Just recompile ppp on a non DES system: cd /usr/src/usr.sbin/ppp && make &&make install
How-To-Repeat: 
/usr/sbin/ppp
